description:
User-confirmed: restore Political Club visually to the hero octahedron (vertex 4, currently empty per FRAC-161) so the geometry reads as complete. Should NOT navigate — display 'Coming Soon' in tooltip. Navbar visibility unchanged (still hidden per FRAC-32).

## Acceptance
- 6th nav-node sphere renders at vertex 4 using Political Club's canonical palette color
- Tooltip on tap reads 'Political Club — Coming Soon' (or equivalent layout)
- Tap does NOT navigate; node is non-interactive beyond surfacing the tooltip
- Navbar still hides Political Club (FRAC-32 unchanged)
- Build + tests baseline preserved
title: Add Political Club nav node to octahedron with 'Coming Soon' state (visual only, non-navigable)
